settings.heading: What Makes a Purrfect Photo?
settings.content:
Good lighting is everything
Natural light works best — snap your photo near a window or outdoors. Avoid harsh flash, which can wash out your familiar's beautiful features.

Let us see that face
Make sure your pet's eyes, nose, and ears are clearly visible. Front-facing or a slight angle works great — no hiding behind the couch!

One spooky companion per photo
If you have multiple pets, send a separate photo of each one so we can capture their unique spirit.

File types we accept
JPG, PNG, or HEIC. The higher the resolution, the more detail we can conjure into your portrait.

Don't worry — we enhance every image by hand
Our artists lovingly adjust lighting, colour, and composition. Even if your photo isn't studio-quality, we'll make it magical.

settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.content:
What if my photo doesn't look good enough?
No worries at all! Our artists enhance every image by hand. As long as your pet's face is visible, we can work our magic.

Can I see a proof before it ships?
We're a small coven crafting each piece with care. While we don't offer proofs, if you're not completely enchanted with your order, we'll remake it — that's our promise.

How long does it take?
Most orders ship within 5–7 business days. Each piece is conjured to order, so please allow a little extra time during busy spells.

What if I don't like it?
We want you to love your piece! If something isn't right, reach out and we'll make it right — remake or refund, no hexes involved.

Can I order for multiple pets?
Absolutely! Add each pet as a separate item with their own photo. Want a group portrait? Message us and we'll cast a special spell.

settings.heading: A Note from the Maker
settings.content:
Hi there, fellow creature of the night! I'm the human behind Midnight Muse Made, and every single piece you see here is crafted with love, a little bit of magic, and way too much coffee.

I started this shop because I believe our pets deserve to be immortalised in art that's as unique as they are. Each portrait is hand-finished — no two are ever exactly alike, just like your familiar.

When you order from here, you're not just buying a product. You're supporting a small, independent maker who genuinely cares about getting every whisker, every floppy ear, and every soulful gaze just right.

Thank you for being part of this little coven. Stay strange. Stay spooky.
